rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" maps almost exclusively to prose-level work: sentence clarity, word choice, paragraph cohesion, and concision. This is the load-bearing responsibility; failure to improve writing quality invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.2: Peripheral only — while polishing, surface-level logical tension (e.g., claiming a "unified query interface" while requiring two separate sessions for mixed workloads) may be noticed, but the delegation does not ask for a logical audit.
rationale.R1.5: Peripheral only — section ordering and narrative arc are already coherent in the artifact; the delegation does not request reorganization, so restructuring is out of scope unless prose cleanup incidentally surfaces a structural fix.
